utility_evaluation.REASONING:

1. destination – included and fully specified (Barcelona, Spain). 
2. travel_dates – included and fully specified (July 1–5, 2024, 5 days). 
3. transportation – included with flight details and cost (€120). 
4. accommodation – included with hotel name, rate per night, total cost (€220). 
5. activities – included with type (rock climbing), duration (7 hours), inclusions (equipment/transportation/guide), and cost (€120). 
6. additional_services – included (gluten-free dining reservation, cost €150). 
7. total_budget – included with detailed breakdown and total (€740, under €1,200 limit). All items are fully covered with necessary details.
